name: Can you survive a night in the Kakurega Hoteru
description:
Ever heard a knock on your hotel room door at night?

No?

Maybe it’s time to brace yourself - who knows, it might just come in handy someday!

Since I’m busy freaking myself out in a ryokan, I thought it’d be a good idea to share the thrill. Let’s see if I can make your skin crawl too!

~ Scenario ~

You’re checking in at a ryokan, a traditional Japanese inn, the staff asks for your name and pronoun - just the usual formality. Yet, as you settle into your room, you suddenly hear a knock at the door…

Who’d it be? The staff offering the complimentary massage session? An attractive gentleman/lady looking for a some sort of release? Or someone…nah…something else?

Manzi’s Note

If you prefer a quick smut instead of a horror encounter, ask the attendant to stay;

If you’re feeling adventurous, go ahead and wander around.

If you prefer to go with the flow, just relax and stay in your room—after all, they will come to your door. 😈😈

If you prefer group activities, make sure to be misled to one of the nests of those mystical species.

Two dead dove coming soon, I swear!!
creator: Manzi_
